title: Algal blooms
subtitle: Algal blooms with humans affected, 2016-2025
source: IOC-UNESCO Harmful Algae Information System. Harmful algae information system, accessible via data.hais.ioc-unesco.org

limitations.aggregation: The file contains 1,094 records but only 85 distinct coordinate pairs. The renderer aggregates exact coordinate duplicates into site markers whose size encodes record count; it does not treat overlapping rows as separately visible points.
limitations.interpretation: Record count is not necessarily a count of unique bloom episodes or affected people. Tooltips report record and event-identifier counts separately.
